changes:
Line 59: Changed `esc_html( $addr['address'] )` to `wp_kses_post( $addr['address'] )` so
tags from RichText render as actual line breaks on the frontend

warnings: Pre-existing lint warnings in unrelated blocks (react-hooks/exhaustive-deps) — not introduced by this change
Sync check: known false-positive root wrapper mismatch (InspectorControls vs section) — standard pattern for editor components with sidebar controls

syncStatus.note:
No TSX change needed. RichText with allowedFormats=[] already saves
on Enter. Only the PHP output escaping needed updating. Matches existing pattern used for hoursContent (line 76) and contactContent (line 86) in the same file.

testPage.note: No test page update needed — block content unchanged, only PHP output escaping modified

fixesApplied.reason:
esc_html() was converting
to <br> entities, preventing line breaks from rendering. wp_kses_post() allows safe HTML tags while still stripping dangerous content.
